29	
30	  architecture:
31	    - "Tracker class is the single source of truth for all business logic"
32	    - "CLI is a thin wrapper: parse args -> call Tracker -> print JSON"
33	    - "Success -> stdout JSON, exit 0; Error -> stderr JSON, exit from error code"
34	    - "All file writes use atomic write-to-temp-then-rename pattern (file-io.ts)"
35	    - "ID generation: Date.now().toString(36).slice(0,6) + Math.random().toString(36).slice(-4) — always 10 chars"
36	    - "Resolution: walk up from cwd looking for .trackgentic/ dir, return abs path or null"
37	    - "Tracker.init() creates .trackgentic/ with config.json, index.json, dependencies.json, users.json, issues/"
38	    - "Init is idempotent: returns ALREADY_INITIALIZED if dir exists, does NOT overwrite"
39	
40	  type_system:

42	    - "API result types include | TrackgenticError for methods that can fail"
43	    - "InitResult is special: ALREADY_INITIALIZED is a valid return (not an error), exit code 0"
44	    - "UsersRegisterResult, UsersRevokeResult, UsersRegenerateResult use discriminated unions with result field"
45	    - "TrackgenticError extends Error with result, message, exitCode fields"
46	    - "ErrorCodes const object maps error names to {result, exitCode} — 13 error codes defined"
47	
48	  testing_patterns:
49	    - "Tests use tmpdir() for isolation with beforeEach/afterEach cleanup"
50	    - "CLI tests use Bun.spawn to run bin.ts as subprocess, check stdout/stderr/exitCode"

1	import { Command } from "commander";
2	import { createAction } from "./commands/create";
3	import { historyAction } from "./commands/history";
4	import { initAction } from "./commands/init";
5	import { listAction } from "./commands/list";
6	import { updateAction } from "./commands/update";
7	import {
8	  usersListAction,
9	  usersRegenerateAction,
10	  usersRegisterAction,
11	  usersRevokeAction,
12	} from "./commands/users";
13	import { viewAction } from "./commands/view";
14	
15	/**
16	 * Create and configure the Commander program.
17	 */
18	export function createProgram(): Command {
19	  const program = new Command();
20	
21	  program
22	    .name("trackgentic")
23	    .description("Issue tracker designed for AI agents — file-backed, event-sourced, git-friendly")
24	    .version("0.1.0");
25	
26	  // ─── init ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
27	  program
28	    .command("init")
29	    .description("Initialize a new .trackgentic/ directory")
30	    .action(initAction);
31	
32	  // ─── create ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
33	  program
34	    .command("create <title>")
35	    .description("Create a new issue")
36	    .option("--description <string>", "Issue description")
37	    .option("--assignee <string>", "Assignee name")
38	    .option("--tags <comma-separated>", "Comma-separated tags")
39	    .option("--status <status>", 'Issue status (default: "idea")')
40	    .option("--priority <number>", "Priority 1-5 (default: 3)")
41	    .option("--parentId <id>", "Parent issue ID")
42	    .option("--path <string>", "Custom file path for the issue")
43	    .action(createAction);
44	
45	  // ─── list ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
46	  program
47	    .command("list")
48	    .description("List issues")
49	    .option(
50	      "--status <status>",
51	      'Filter by status (use "open" for non-closed, "closed" for closed)',
52	    )
53	    .option("--assignee <string>", "Filter by assignee")
54	    .option("--tags <comma-separated>", "Comma-separated tags (AND filter)")
55	    .option("--parentId <id>", 'Filter by parent ID (use "null" for top-level)')
56	    .action(listAction);
57	
58	  // ─── view ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
59	  program
60	    .command("view <issueId>")
61	    .description("View an issue's full computed state")
62	    .action(viewAction);
63	
64	  // ─── update ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
65	  program
66	    .command("update <issueId>")
67	    .description("Update an existing issue")
68	    .option("--title <string>", "New title")
69	    .option("--description <string>", "New description")
70	    .option("--status <status>", "New status")
71	    .option("--assignee <string>", "New assignee")
72	    .option("--tags <comma-separated>", "New tags (replaces existing)")
73	    .option("--priority <number>", "New priority (1-5)")
74	    .option("--parentId <id>", 'New parent ID (use "null" to detach)')
75	    .action(updateAction);
76	
77	  // ─── history ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
78	  program
79	    .command("history <issueId>")
80	    .description("View an issue's raw event history")
81	    .action(historyAction);
82	
83	  // ─── users ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
84	  const usersCmd = program.command("users").description("Manage users");
85	
86	  usersCmd
87	    .command("register <name>")
88	    .description("Register a new user")
89	    .action(usersRegisterAction);
90	
91	  usersCmd.command("list").description("List registered users").action(usersListAction);
92	
93	  usersCmd.command("revoke <name>").description("Revoke (remove) a user").action(usersRevokeAction);
94	
95	  usersCmd
96	    .command("regenerate <name>")
97	    .description("Regenerate a user's token (self-service only)")
98	    .action(usersRegenerateAction);
99	
100	  return program;
101	}
102

1	/**
2	 * Typed error class for all trackgentic operations.
3	 * Each error has a result code, human-readable message, and CLI exit code.
4	 */
5	export class TrackgenticError extends Error {
6	  constructor(
7	    public readonly result: string,
8	    public override readonly message: string,
9	    public readonly exitCode: number,
10	  ) {
11	    super(message);
12	    this.name = "TrackgenticError";
13	  }
14	}
15	
16	// Error codes with their associated exit codes
17	export const ErrorCodes = {
18	  NOT_INITIALIZED: { result: "NOT_INITIALIZED", exitCode: 1 },
19	  ALREADY_INITIALIZED: { result: "ALREADY_INITIALIZED", exitCode: 0 },
20	  TOKEN_REQUIRED: { result: "TOKEN_REQUIRED", exitCode: 2 },
21	  INVALID_TOKEN: { result: "INVALID_TOKEN", exitCode: 3 },
22	  DEFAULT_USER_MISSING: { result: "DEFAULT_USER_MISSING", exitCode: 4 },
23	  NOT_FOUND: { result: "NOT_FOUND", exitCode: 5 },
24	  ISSUE_MISSING: { result: "ISSUE_MISSING", exitCode: 6 },
25	  COMMENT_NOT_FOUND: { result: "COMMENT_NOT_FOUND", exitCode: 7 },
26	  USER_ALREADY_EXISTS: { result: "USER_ALREADY_EXISTS", exitCode: 8 },
27	  USER_NOT_FOUND: { result: "USER_NOT_FOUND", exitCode: 9 },
28	  INVALID_PARAMS: { result: "INVALID_PARAMS", exitCode: 10 },
29	  BLOCKAGE_CYCLE: { result: "BLOCKAGE_CYCLE", exitCode: 11 },
30	  HIERARCHY_CONSTRAINT: { result: "HIERARCHY_CONSTRAINT", exitCode: 12 },
31	} as const;
32

input.content:
# Library Developer Expertise Index
# Agent: library-developer
# Domain: TypeScript library development — npm package implementation, build, testing, and publishing

hierarchy:
  manager: cto
  subordinates: [none — leaf agent]

expertise_status: "Phase 1-3 complete. 167 tests passing, 99.22% line coverage, typecheck & lint clean."

knowledge:
  project_structure:
    - "Monorepo: root workspace with packages/library (the npm package)"
    - "Package entry: src/index.ts (barrel exports), src/bin.ts (CLI with shebang)"
    - "Types in src/types/, core logic in src/core/, CLI in src/cli/"
    - "CLI commands in src/cli/commands/ (init, create, list, view, update, history, users)"
    - "Tests in tests/ using bun:test (describe/test/expect)"
    - "Test helpers in tests/helpers/ (setup.ts, fixtures.ts, assertions.ts)"
    - "Test structure mirrors src: tests/core/, tests/cli/ (no tests/integration/ yet — empty dir)"
    - "dependency-manager.ts still a stub (Phase 6)"

  build_and_run:
    - "Bun runtime — bun test for tests, bun run src/bin.ts for CLI"
    - "TypeScript typecheck: bun run typecheck (runs tsc --noEmit via npm script)"
    - "bun x tsc doesn't work (resolves wrong tsc); must use npm script or full path"
    - "tsconfig uses types: ['@types/bun'] not 'bun-types'"
    - "Linting: ESLint 9 + typescript-eslint (flat config: eslint.config.js)"
    - "Formatting: Prettier (semi: true, double quotes, trailing comma: all, printWidth: 100)"
    - "Scripts: lint, lint:fix, format, format:check, docs:generate, docs:check, quality"
    - "Quality script: typecheck + lint + test:coverage in one command"

  dependencies:
    - "commander ^13.0.0 for CLI argument parsing"
    - "typescript ^5.7.0 and @types/bun ^1.2.0 as devDependencies"
    - "@eslint/js ^9.28.0, eslint ^9.28.0, typescript-eslint ^8.33.0, prettier ^3.5.3 as devDependencies"
    - "typedoc ^0.28.19 and typedoc-plugin-markdown ^4.11.0 as devDependencies"
    - "No other runtime deps — all file I/O via node:fs/node:path"

  architecture:
    - "Tracker class is the single source of truth for all business logic"
    - "CLI is a thin wrapper: parse args -> call Tracker -> print JSON"
    - "Success -> stdout JSON, exit 0; Error -> stderr JSON, exit from error code"
    - "All file writes use atomic write-to-temp-then-rename pattern (file-io.ts)"
    - "ID generation: Date.now().toString(36).slice(0,6) + Math.random().toString(36).slice(-4) — always 10 chars"
    - "Resolution: walk up from cwd looking for .trackgentic/ dir, return abs path or null"
    - "Tracker.init() creates .trackgentic/ with config.json, index.json, dependencies.json, users.json, issues/"
    - "Init is idempotent: returns ALREADY_INITIALIZED if dir exists, does NOT overwrite"
    - "Event-sourced: each issue stored as JSON array of events in issues/[id].json"
    - "Two events on creation: creation event + update event with initial fields"
    - "computeState() replays events to produce ComputedIssue (title, desc, status, priority, assignee, parentId, tags)"
    - "Index manager maintains sorted arrays (open/closed) + childrenOf map for fast lookups"
    - "Index entries updated on create/update; binary search for lookups"
    - "Auth: resolveAuthor() checks token -> mode (open/read-only/strict) -> defaultUser fallback"
    - "Auth reads TRACKGENTIC_USER_TOKEN env var; tokens are tk_ + 8 random alphanumeric chars"
    - "Users register is bootstrap (no auth required); list requires read auth; revoke/regenerate require write auth"
    - "Token regeneration is self-service only (caller must be the target user)"

  type_system:
    - "All types match spec 02-data-model.md and 03-api-specification.md exactly"
    - "API result types include | TrackgenticError for methods that can fail"
    - "InitResult is special: ALREADY_INITIALIZED is a valid return (not an error), exit code 0"
    - "UsersRegisterResult, UsersRevokeResult, UsersRegenerateResult use discriminated unions with result field"
    - "TrackgenticError extends Error with result, message, exitCode fields"
    - "ErrorCodes const object maps error names to {result, exitCode} — 13 error codes defined (exit codes 0-12)"
    - "Event union: CreationEvent | UpdateEvent | CommentEvent | CommentUpdateEvent | CommentDeleteEvent | BlockageAddedEvent | BlockageResolvedEvent | BlockageDeletedEvent"
    - "ComputedIssue: id, title, description, status, priority, assignee, parentId, tags, createdAt, createdBy, updatedAt"
    - "IndexEntry: id, title, path, status, assignee, parentId, tags, priority (denormalized for fast list/filter)"
    - "IndexFile: open[], closed[], childrenOf Record<string, string[]>"
    - "UserEntry: name (lowercase), token, registeredAt; UserInfo: name, registeredAt (no token)"

  testing_patterns:
    - "Tests use createTestDir() from tests/helpers/setup.ts for isolation with cleanup"
    - "CLI tests use Bun.spawn to run bin.ts as subprocess, check stdout/stderr/exitCode"
    - "ID tests verify length (10), format (base36), and uniqueness (100 samples)"
    - "167 tests across 8 files: auth, events, file-io, id, index-manager, resolution, tracker, CLI commands"
    - "99.22% line coverage (only resolution.ts has 93.75% — edge cases in walk-up logic)"
    - "Test files: tests/core/{auth,events,file-io,id,index-manager,resolution,tracker}.test.ts + tests/cli/commands.test.ts"

  cli_commands:
    - "init — no args, creates .trackgentic/ dir"
    - "create <title> — options: --description, --assignee, --tags (comma-sep), --status, --priority, --parentId, --path"
    - "list — options: --status, --assignee, --tags (comma-sep), --parentId ('null' for top-level)"
    - "view <issueId> — shows full computed state"
    - "update <issueId> — options: --title, --description, --status, --assignee, --tags, --priority, --parentId ('null' to detach)"
    - "history <issueId> — shows raw event array"
    - "users register <name> — registers a new user"
    - "users list — lists registered users (tokens stripped)"
    - "users revoke <name> — removes a user"
    - "users regenerate <name> — regenerates token (self-service only)"

  phase_status:
    phase_1: "COMPLETE — types, core (errors, id, resolution, file-io, tracker.init), CLI (runner, output, init cmd), barrel exports"
    phase_2: "COMPLETE — event engine (events.ts: appendEvent, replayEvents, computeState), index manager (index-manager.ts: binary search, insert/update/find/remove entries), CRUD (create/list/view/update/history), CLI commands for all CRUD operations"
    phase_3: "COMPLETE — auth system (auth.ts: resolveAuthor with open/read-only/strict modes, token validation, env var lookup), user management (usersRegister, usersList, usersRevoke, usersRegenerate), CLI users commands"
    phase_4: "NOT STARTED — comments (add/update/delete/list)"
    phase_5: "NOT STARTED — issue hierarchy"
    phase_6: "NOT STARTED — blockages & dependencies (dependency-manager.ts still a stub)"
    phase_7: "NOT STARTED — polish & hardening"

content.text:
All three checks pass — typecheck clean, lint clean, 167 tests passing.

Here's a summary of what I updated in the expertise index:

**Key changes captured:**

1. **Phase 2 complete** — Event engine (`events.ts`: `appendEvent`, `replayEvents`, `computeState`), index manager (`index-manager.ts`: binary search, insert/update/find/remove entries), and full CRUD operations (`create`, `list`, `view`, `update`, `history`) with corresponding CLI commands.

2. **Phase 3 complete** — Auth system (`auth.ts`: `resolveAuthor` with `open`/`read-only`/`strict` modes, token validation, `TRACKGENTIC_USER_TOKEN` env var), user management (`usersRegister`, `usersList`, `usersRevoke`, `usersRegenerate`), and CLI users subcommands.

3. **Tooling swap** — Biome replaced with **Prettier** (semi, double quotes, trailing comma, 100 print width) + **ESLint 9** with `typescript-eslint` (flat config in `eslint.config.js`). Added `lint`, `lint:fix`, `format`, `format:check`, `quality` scripts.

4. **Updated stats** — 167 tests across 8 files, 846 expect() calls, 99.22% line coverage, typecheck + lint clean.

5. **New sections added** — `cli_commands` (all 10 commands documented), expanded `architecture` (event sourcing, index manager, auth flow, token format), expanded `type_system` (event union, ComputedIssue shape, IndexEntry, IndexFile, UserEntry/UserInfo), expanded `testing_patterns` (test file list, coverage details).

6. **Dependencies updated** — Added `@eslint/js`, `eslint`, `typescript-eslint`, `prettier`, `typedoc`, `typedoc-plugin-markdown` as devDependencies.
